title: Financial Reporting Section
subtitle: Accountability, precision, and state auditing compliance.

servicesList.name: Consolidation of Financial Statements
servicesList.desc: Preparation and consolidation of the City’s Trial Balances, Statements of Financial Position, and Statements of Financial Performance across all funds.

servicesList.name: Barangay & LGU Financial Review
servicesList.desc: Technical evaluation and checking of financial reports submitted by component barangays to ensure uniformity and compliance with accounting rules.

servicesList.name: Submission of Regulatory Accountability Reports
servicesList.desc: Timely preparation and submission of monthly, quarterly, and annual financial disclosures to the COA and DBM.

servicesList.name: Tax Remittance Management
servicesList.desc: Processing, reconciliation, and filing of the local government unit's withholding taxes to the Bureau of Internal Revenue (BIR).
